stimulus:
Welcome!

In this study, you will play three short video games that were generated by Artificial Intelligence (AI) and complete a short survey after each game.

Please make sure you are in a quiet environment where you can focus for the duration of the study. Some games may use sound, so please ensure that your device's volume is not muted.

Press any key to begin.
Press any key to proceed to the first video game. Should you encounter a game-breaking bug, please report the issue in the Menu tab to the right of the screen.

response: {"creativity-rating":4,"creativity-free-response":"the game's idea of fast learning and applying the rules is creative. the creatures' responses and the rules make the game more interactive ","originality-rating":5,"originality-free-response":"all of the game felt new and original as I have never seen this type of game before, also the game mechanics and sound effects are amazing","effectiveness-rating":4,"effectiveness-free-response":"the game was somewhat enjoyable because of the sound effects, the creative rules and the game graphics is good, but one of the bad aspects of the game is that it did not give me enough time to read and memorise the new rules.","authenticity-rating":5,"attention-check":3,"intentionality-rating":4,"authenticity-intentionality-free-response":"the game's idea is authentic and original. Although the game is 2d but it felt like there was a big effort in the game development because of the animations, the sound effects, and the creature interactive responses"}

response: {"creativity-rating":5,"creativity-free-response":"the game visual and sound effect makes it more creative, also the gameplay is enjoyable","originality-rating":5,"originality-free-response":"the game's sound and visual effects makes it original ","effectiveness-rating":5,"effectiveness-free-response":"the movement and functionality was smooth with no issues, the game was overall enjoyable","attention-check":3,"authenticity-rating":5,"intentionality-rating":5,"authenticity-intentionality-free-response":"the idea is authentic and the developer seems to have done a big effort to produce this game because of its novel idea and visual effects"}

response: {"ai_aware_question":"The first and third game was very entertaining but the second game seemed to be under developed because it lacked sound effects and the visual effects in it was not good overall. The Ai should keep in mind the small details of the game like giving the player enough time to read and understand the rules as in the first game. The Ai MUST put sound effects in the games as the make the game feel a lot entertaining. The Ai also should make the idea of the game more realistic as the game story feels exaggerated."}
